name: My AI Skill Tutor
description: AI upskilling platform for working professionals: role-based AI learning modules, a 24/7 AI tutor, daily AI news filtered to the user's field, and public proof-of-skill profiles that employers can inspect.

skills.name: AI Skills Assessment
skills.description: Anonymous assessment that recommends which AI skills a professional should build first.

skills.name: AI Upskilling Guides
skills.description: Public editorial guides on building AI skills, portfolios, and career proof.

skills.name: Talent Directory
skills.description: Public directory of professionals with proof-based AI skill profiles.

skills.name: Public Proof Profiles
skills.description: Per-user public pages showcasing verified skills and projects.
